description: Letter addressed to Fustat. In Judaeo-Arabic. On parchment. Dating: Likely 11th century. Mentions a caravan; meeting with Ibn al-Ghardīs (there was a judge by this name in Fez in the late 11th century) and Ibn Wāsīlan(?); the rotting of the names of the wicked; and a gathering of the elders of "the two cities."
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
